templates.wantPattern: {giver} needs someone to learn why {landmark} has changed before the change reaches {settlement}.
templates.claimPattern: {giver} says {landmark} lies {direction}, at zone {destinationZone}. Go there and recover {token} as proof of what the place is doing.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} cannot settle a local obligation until somebody recovers a trace from {landmark}.
templates.claimPattern: A usable trace remains at {landmark}, {direction} in zone {destinationZone}. Reaching it will make {token} real enough to carry.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} wants {district} to have a witness no official account can quietly replace.
templates.claimPattern: {landmark} can supply that witness. It is {direction}, in zone {destinationZone}; find {token} there.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} needs a local answer from {landmark} before offering help to anyone else.
templates.claimPattern: The answer waits {direction} at {landmark}, zone {destinationZone}. A traveler who arrives will find {token}.
